sections.paragraph:
ϰληρονομία, ας, ἡ [κληρονόμος]

—1. ‘a share in what is passed on by a testator’, inheritance, in legal sense Mt 21:38; Mk 12:7; Lk 12:13; 20:14.

—2. ‘participation in a share’, inheritance w. focus on divine conferral of promised benefit(s) Ac 20:32; Gal 3:18; Eph 1:14, 18; 5:5; Col 3:24; Hb 9:15; 1 Pt 1:4.

—3. A combination of components of 1 and 2 is observable, owing to influence of ideas in OT, in Ac 7:5; 13:33 v.l.; Hb 11:8 in the sense possession.
